rulings.Case Title: IN THE MATTER OF THE ERNEST V. RHINE TRUST
rulings.Calendar Matter: ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Notice Of Motion And Motion To Compel Lydia Marquez Rhine'S Further Responses To Special Interrogatories, Set One, And Requests For Monetary Sanctions
rulings.Rulings: Respondent Kimberly Rhine Gagosian's ("Respondent") Motion to Compel Petitioner Lydia Rhine's ("Petitioner") Further Responses to Requests for Production of Documents ("RFPs") is GRANTED in part and DENIED in part. Respondent's request to compel further responses to RFPs 16 and 17 is denied as those requests seek to invade the financial privacy of unidentified third parties who have not placed their financial situation(s) at issue. Respondent's request to compel further responses to RFP 18 is granted as the information requested therein is relevant to the allegations made by Petitioner in her First Amended Petition. As to RFPs 6, 7, 14, 19, and 26, Petitioner is ordered to provide amended responses to those RFPs within 15 days of the date of this order, as agreed by Petitioner's counsel during the meet and confer process. Respondent's request that the Court strike Petitioner's preliminary statement and general objections is denied. Respondent's request for monetary sanctions is also denied. Respondent's Motion to Compel Petitioner Lydia Rhine's Further Responses to Special Interrogatories ("SIs") 17, 19-22, 25, and 28 is GRANTED in part and DENIED in part. Respondent's request to compel further responses to SIs 19, 21, 25 and 28 is granted as the information requested therein is relevant to allegations made by Petitioner in her First Amended Petition. Respondent's request to compel further responses to SIs 17, 20, and 22 is denied. Request 17 seeks Petitioner's social security number, which is irrelevant to investigate and/or defend against the claims made in the First Amended Petition. Requests 20 and 22 seek to invade the financial privacy of unidentified third parties who have not placed their financial situation(s) at issue. Respondent's request that the Court strike Petitioner's preliminary statement and general objections is denied. Respondent's request for monetary sanctions is also denied.

rulings.Case Title: IN THE MATTER OF THE ERNEST V. RHINE TRUST
rulings.Calendar Matter: ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Notice Of Motion And Motion To Compel Production Of Records Held By San Francisco Human Services Agency
rulings.Rulings: Respondent's Motion to Compel Production of Records Held by San Francisco Human Services Agency is GRANTED, but the requested Adult Protective Services ("APS") records shall be produced to the Court under seal. Any party seeking copies of the APS records must file a request with the Court, and submit a protective order setting forth the terms for disclosure and use of the APS records.
